name: india-rbi-rate-decision

brief.intent: Analyze the effects of RBI's monetary policy decisions on India's economy and financial markets
must_answer: How do recent RBI rate changes affect inflation trends?
What is the impact of rate decisions on India's GDP growth projections?
How are currency markets reacting to the monetary policy shifts?
What adjustments are commercial banks making following the rate announcements?
How does the RBI justify its rate decisions in terms of economic goals?
sub_questions: What was the magnitude and direction of the latest rate change?
How do current rates compare to historical RBI monetary policy trends?
Which economic indicators (inflation, GDP, unemployment) does the RBI prioritize in its decisions?
What forward guidance does the RBI provide about future policy direction?
How do India's rate decisions compare to other emerging market central banks?
What tools besides interest rates does the RBI use for monetary policy implementation?
How are government bond yields reacting to the rate environment?
brief.evaluation_rubric: Evaluate based on: authority of sources (central bank > news > academic), recency of data (within 30 days), direct relevance to RBI policy decisions and their impacts, balanced analysis of both inflation control and growth promotion aspects

sources.title: Mint
sources.snippet:
Title: ‘1.2 million Indian Americans, their families in limbo’: US lawmakers slam new green card policy
URL: https://www.livemint.com/news/us-news/12-million-indian-americans-their-families-in-limbo-us-lawmakers-slam-new-green-card-policy-11779547316159.html
Date: 2026-05-23T15:25:59.000Z
US lawmakers and immigration advocates criticise the Trump administration's new green card policy that requires applicants to apply from their home countries, calling it reckless and harmful.

---

Title: Thailand ends 60-day visa-free stay for Indians and others: What it means for travelers with existing permission?
URL: https://www.livemint.com/news/trends/thailand-visa-news-tourist-visa-free-stay-for-indians-ends-11779550734027.html
Date: 2026-05-23T16:13:51.000Z
The government said the earlier 60-day exemption had originally been introduced to revive tourism and strengthen economic recovery after the pandemic.

---

Title: Delhi Gymkhana Club falls under ‘highly sensitive & strategic area’, says Centre, asked to hand over premises by June 5
URL: https://www.livemint.com/news/india/delhi-gymkhana-club-falls-under-highly-sensitive-strategic-area-says-centre-asked-to-hand-over-premises-june-5-11779524428808.html
Date: 2026-05-23T09:41:58.000Z
The central govt has ordered the takeover of the Delhi Gymkhana Club premises for public and national interest, citing its strategic location essential for defense infrastructure and security. The govt issued the directive for land originally leased to the club for social & sporting activities.
